hero.badge: The team platform you never knew you needed
hero.subtitle: Mannschaft is an all-in-one management platform that brings together everything your team or organization needs. From sports teams to salons, clinics, and reunions — the possibilities are endless.
hero.note: Mostly free. Just create a personal account first.

features.subheading: All the features your team needs, in one platform

0.title: Team & Org Management
0.desc: Invite members, assign roles, and manage permissions with ease

1.title: Events & Calendar
1.desc: Share schedules, track attendance, and set reminders in one place

2.title: Chat & Bulletin Board
2.desc: Group chat, circulars, and timeline for seamless communication

3.title: Shift Management
3.desc: Create shifts, collect preferences, and handle swap requests

4.title: Forms & Surveys
4.desc: Build forms, collect responses, and view analytics in one stop

5.title: Gallery & Files
5.desc: Share photos, videos, and documents securely with your team

6.title: Dues & Payments
6.desc: Digitize membership fee invoicing and payment tracking

7.title: Matching & Tournaments
7.desc: Organize team matchups, tournaments, and record results

0.title: Sign up for free
0.desc: Get started right now with just your email address.

1.title: Create a team or org
1.desc: Pick a template, create your team or organization, and invite members.

2.title: Start using features
2.desc: Enable only the features you need — schedules, chat, shifts, and more.

useCases.heading: Used in many settings
useCases.subheading: Adaptable to teams and organizations of any industry or size

0.title: Sports Teams
0.desc: Practice & game schedules, shift coordination, attendance tracking, and standings.

1.title: Local Communities
1.desc: Centralize event announcements, newsletters, and fee management online. Also great for reunions, neighborhood associations, and volunteer groups.

2.title: Businesses & Workplaces
2.desc: Cross-department project management, approval workflows, and internal communication. Also perfect for small businesses like salons and chiropractic clinics.

3.title: Education & Schools
3.desc: Parent communication, club management, activity records, photo sharing, and surveys.

0.a: Core features are free. We also offer paid plans for larger teams with advanced needs.

1.q: How many members can I invite?
1.a: Even on the free plan, you can invite multiple members. For large-scale teams, consider our dedicated plans.

2.q: Can I use it on my smartphone?
2.a: Yes. Mannschaft is fully responsive and works on smartphones and tablets via your web browser.

3.a: We use SSL/TLS encryption and perform regular backups to keep your data secure.

4.q: Can I manage multiple teams or organizations?
4.a: Yes. A single account can belong to multiple teams and organizations, each managed independently.

cta.heading: Try it free today
cta.subheading: Sign up now and start managing your team.

layout.footer_tagline: The all-in-one platform that unites your team

seo.title: Mannschaft - All-in-One Team Management Platform
seo.description: Mannschaft is an all-in-one management platform for sports teams, communities, and businesses — member management, scheduling, chat, payments, and more.
seo.og_description: Everything for team management in one place. Members, schedules, chat, and payments.
